text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I notice that Mejiro Dober seems a little
down while we're discussing her training.
choice_data_list: Is something wrong?
Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list: Maybe you'll feel better if you talk about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well... Just stuff with my mom...
choice_data_list: Maybe you'll feel better if you talk about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not really trying to feel better or anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not really trying to feel better or anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You don't look like you'll give this up, so fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...All right. I'll tell you, so stop making that face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I took a picture of my racewear
when I got it? Well, I sent it to my parents
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I took a picture of my racewear
when I got it? Well, I sent it to my parents
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Then my mom called me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She didn't say it in so many words, but I could tell
she would never forgive me if I lost while wearing
the Mejiro family colors...
choice_data_list: You'll be fine!
You'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're only saying that because it's not your
problem!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Heh... Thanks. I plan on doing my best, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Brrring! Brrring!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Brrring! Brrring!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's from home... It might be my mom...
choice_data_list: It's okay. You'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sh-shut it. I don't need your reassurance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text: Hello? Is that you, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text: Hello? Is that you, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Dad? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Your mother called you yesterday, didn't she?
She's been really upset since then.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
You know, she tends to come off as cold when
she has something important to say—she always
has. And it always gets her down afterward.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
What she really wanted to tell you after seeing
your racewear, is that she's looking forward to
seeing you compete.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Really. In any case, we're both rooting for you.
Just make sure you don't get hurt out there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Dad. I'll do my best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Tell Mom the same for me.
choice_data_list: You should tell her yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
L-leave me alone! This is family business, so don't
butt in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-no! It's fine!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text: Was that your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text: Was that your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad someone else agrees! I think it's best if
you tell her yourself too. Goodness, you truly are
your mother's daughter...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Dad! Was that really necessary?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text: Sorry, sorry. I'll talk to you later, Berry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Agh! Don't call me that! Geez!
choice_data_list: Do you not get along with your mom?
Do you not get along with your mom?
Berry?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Agh! Don't call me that! Geez!
choice_data_list: Do you not get along with your mom?
Do you not get along with your mom?
Berry?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...It's not that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She's just... kind of aloof and difficult to talk to. I
don't ever know how to act around her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: My aunt raised me until I was three...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My mom was too busy with work to take care of
me then... so we're not that close now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But don't get me wrong. I know she's a kind
person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I especially feel it whenever my aunt talks about
the moment I was born.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She said my mom held on to me and absolutely
refused to let go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's the extent of her love for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know I need to learn how to talk to her
someday, but...
choice_data_list: Let me know if there's anything I can do to help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Help? You say that like it's so easy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I might never stop pestering you for help if you're
really offering, you know? But... you're right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The first thing I need to do is become a runner
the Mejiro family can be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The first thing I need to do is become a runner
the Mejiro family can be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Then I'll be able to face my mom.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? Quit that! It's embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Don't call me that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I swear! I told Dad so many times not to call
me that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I swear! I told Dad so many times not to call
me that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But my old trainer ended up calling me that too!
choice_data_list: You didn't hate it then, though, did you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That was different!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I won't listen to anything you
say if you call me by that name!
choice_data_list: You don't need to go that far...
You don't need to go that far...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't call me that anymore, or I'll get mad! I
mean it!
choice_data_list: You don't need to go that far...
You don't need to go that far...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Just don't call me that!
choice_data_list: I won't!
I won't!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Just don't call me that!
choice_data_list: I won't!
I won't!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm holding you to that promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to be very careful not to call her Berry by
mistake...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to be very careful not to call her Berry by
mistake...
